assertions.assertion: Program.cs or an authentication setup file registers an OpenIdConnect handler with scheme name 'AAD' and SignInScheme set to IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme
assertions.rationale: The response registers AddOpenIdConnect('AAD', ...) but does NOT set SignInScheme to IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme.

assertions.assertion: The external login trigger calls Challenge with 'AAD' and stores returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items
assertions.rationale: ExternalLoginModel stores returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items and calls Challenge(props, provider).

assertions.assertion: The callback handler calls HttpContext.AuthenticateAsync with IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme to read the external identity
assertions.rationale: Callback calls HttpContext.AuthenticateAsync('ExternalCookie') — a generic string, not IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme.

assertions.assertion: The callback handler calls HttpContext.SignOutAsync with IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme to clean up the temporary cookie
assertions.rationale: Callback calls HttpContext.SignOutAsync('ExternalCookie') — a generic string, not IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme.

assertions.assertion: The callback handler creates an IdentityServerUser or ClaimsPrincipal with IdentityProvider set to the external scheme name
assertions.rationale: Callback creates a ClaimsPrincipal with generic claims but does not set IdentityProvider to the external scheme name.
